config.seed_text: A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text:
The sentence has been reread from memory for all possible reasons (if not always an original) but only once or twice with any other words which make sense to you at first glance; without meaning we can't tell what happened on their part until they think again! You cannot imagine anything better than having this experience where no one sees your own mind as being closed out when something comes down into submission while every utterance is repeated over some period of time--the effect that occurs during each particular statement may mean nothing since "we never even knew" did not occur anymore."
